narrative: Regional CLEC serving 47k access lines. CPNI breach detected 2026-04-02 — call detail records of 18,400 customers accessed by unauthorized internal account. USSS + FBI not yet notified — past 7 business days. Customer notification not yet issued. STIR/SHAKEN missing — voice service provider has not implemented STIR/SHAKEN attestation and has no robocall mitigation program filed. NORS outage 2026-04-18 affected 14,200 wireline subscribers for 8 hours — exceeded 30k user-minute threshold but initial outage report not filed within 120 minutes. CALEA lawful intercept capability not ready — last test 2024-09-15, three intervening network upgrades. E911 reliability gap — diverse paths not implemented for 4 wire centers; ALI database not updated 18 months. Annual CPNI certification overdue — last filing March 2024.
